Savings[LXXXV], § 8512(b)(1), , , provided that:Pub. L. 116–283, div. G, title LVXXXV134 Stat. 4759Jan. 1, 2021“Notwithstanding any repeals made by this section [repealing this section and sections 717, 727, 728, 730a, 743, 745a, 747b, 748, 754a, 763–1, 763–2, 763a–1, and 770 to 772 of this title], any individual beneficiary currently receiving payments under the authority of any provisions repealed in this section shall continue to receive such benefits.”
